title: Inaccurate AVG of SQRT with 51M records
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO large_data SELECT ROUND(RAND() * 100, 2) FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 51000000;
SELECT AVG(SQRT(value)) FROM large_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_data SELECT SQRT(value) FROM large_data WHERE value > 0;
key_bug_features: Inaccurate AVG calculation for SQRT with large datasets
